# Index: .github

> Corpus index. Do not edit manually - refresh with the index-docs workflow.

## Subfolders

| Folder | Description |
|---|---|
| agents/INDEX.md | Specialist agent definitions and lifecycle-oriented metadata. |
| instructions/INDEX.md | Always-on policy instruction files and lifecycle catalog. |
| prompts/INDEX.md | Reusable prompt templates and prompt lifecycle catalog. |
| scripts/INDEX.md | Automation scripts and supporting script documentation. |
| skills/INDEX.md | Reusable workflow skills, references, and discovery index. |
| workflows/INDEX.md | GitHub workflow automation definitions and release cadence checks. |

## Documents

| File | Title | Category | Summary |
|---|---|---|---|
| README.md | .github Customization Hub | reference | Entry-point guidance for .github customization assets and canonical inventory links. |
| agent-lifecycle-catalog.md | Agents Lifecycle Catalog | reference | Canonical lane mapping and ownership rationale for all workspace agents. |
